title: Aureline docs / Help / About / service-health truth-source and badge vocabulary
description: Boundary schema for the help_status_badge_record, the citation_anchor_record, and the docs_help_service_health audit-event record frozen in docs/adr/0013-docs-help-service-health-truth.md. Every row rendered on a docs pane, the docs browser, a Help / About surface, the service-health view, an onboarding step, an AI-explanation overlay, or a support-summary export resolves to exactly one help_status_badge_record. Raw docs bytes, raw runbook bodies, raw symbol definitions, and raw URLs never cross the RPC boundary; this schema carries ids and typed vocabulary only. The eventual docs-help-service-health crate's Rust types are the schema of record; this file is the cross-tool boundary every non-owning surface reads. Adding a new source class, version-match state, service-contract state, degraded-state cause, anchor kind, surface class, audit-event id, or denial reason is additive-minor and requires a help_status_badge_schema_version bump; repurposing an existing value is breaking and requires a new decision row.

help_status_badge_schema_version.description: Integer schema version for this docs / help / service-health badge vocabulary export. Current value is 1. Bumped only on breaking payload changes; additive-optional fields do not bump this version.

record_kind.description: Discriminator for the concrete payload shape. Every record carries exactly one kind.

opaque_id.description: Opaque, stable id safe to log, safe on RPC, safe in manifests / journal entries / support bundles / claim manifests.

monotonic_timestamp.description: ISO 8601 UTC timestamp produced from a monotonic clock source.

source_class.description: Frozen source-of-truth class for the row. project_docs and generated_reference outrank vendor_provider_docs on in-scope topics by default; admin policy may narrow this rule but may not silently widen it. derived_explanation rows MUST cite at least one authoritative anchor.

version_match_state.description: Frozen version-match-state vocabulary. Computed at render time against the running build's exact-build identity (running_build_identity_ref). incompatible_drift_detected and unknown_target_build rows MUST render with a typed degraded_state_cause and a repair_hook_ref.

freshness_class.description: Re-exported from schemas/governance/capability_lifecycle.schema.json without modification (ADR-0011). A surface whose canonical owner has not been contacted within its refresh window MUST NOT render authoritative_live.

client_scope.description: Re-exported from schemas/governance/capability_lifecycle.schema.json without modification (ADR-0011). A row whose client_scope excludes the rendering surface MUST NOT render as available there.

surface_class.description: Frozen surface-class vocabulary naming which protected surface emitted the badge. Each surface family has additional projection requirements (see ADR-0013).

service_contract_state.description: Frozen service-contract-state vocabulary emitted by the single service_health_aggregator. Per-feature panels MUST quote this aggregator; per-feature service-state vocabularies are forbidden.

degraded_state_cause.description: Frozen degraded-state-cause vocabulary. Required when freshness_class is below authoritative_live, version_match_state is below exact_build_match, or service_contract_state is below ready. Every cause MUST come with a repair_hook_ref.

browser_handoff_reason_subset.description: Frozen subset of the ADR-0010 browser_handoff_packet.reason_code values that docs / Help / About / service-health surfaces are allowed to quote. Surfaces MUST NOT mint a parallel reason vocabulary; full packet bodies live behind schemas/integration/browser_handoff_packet.schema.json.

anchor_kind.description: Frozen citation-anchor kind vocabulary. derived_explanation rows MUST cite at least one authoritative anchor (docs_page_anchor, generated_reference_anchor, symbol_reference_anchor, runbook_step_anchor, or release_note_anchor); citing only an external_status_feed_anchor or vendor_provider_anchor is not sufficient.

audit_event_id.description: Frozen audit-event ids on the docs_help_service_health audit stream. Events MUST NOT carry raw docs bytes, raw runbook bodies, raw symbol definitions, or raw URLs.

denial_reason.description: Frozen denial-reason vocabulary for the docs_help_service_health audit stream. Denials fail closed; silent downgrade to a generic 'unavailable' chip is forbidden.

redaction_class.description: Re-exported from schemas/governance/capability_lifecycle.schema.json without modification (ADR-0011). The broker-owned redaction pass (ADR-0007) runs before bytes reach any persistent or exportable sink.

trust_state.description: ADR-0001 workspace-trust state at the moment the row / anchor / event was recorded.

execution_context_id.description: ADR-0009 execution-context id when the row was recorded inside a live execution. Null when the record was minted outside an execution context.

policy_context.description: Policy context the record was minted under. ADR-0008 / ADR-0009 policy epoch and ADR-0001 trust state are re-validated on every render.

display_label.description: Short human-legible label the surface may render next to the chip.

repair_hook_ref.description: Typed repair hook required for every non-null degraded_state_cause and for every disabled service-contract-state row. A row with a degraded_state_cause but no repair_hook_ref is non-conforming.

destination_class.description: Re-exported from schemas/integration/browser_handoff_packet.schema.json without modification (ADR-0010). Docs / Help / About / service-health surfaces typically use docs_or_portal_web, identity_provider_web, managed_admin_web, or external_generic_web.

browser_handoff_packet_ref.description: Inline reference to the ADR-0010 browser_handoff_packet that the badge row exposes for an out-of-product action. The full packet body lives behind schemas/integration/browser_handoff_packet.schema.json. The badge record carries only the packet id, destination class, and (subset-checked) reason code; raw URLs never live on the badge.

running_build_identity_ref.description: Opaque pin to the running build's exact-build identity (D-0011). Parity audits and support exports consume this field mechanically.

source_revision_ref.description: Opaque pin to the source pack / reference / runbook revision the row was minted against. Null only for external_status_feed rows.

client_scopes.description: Client classes this row surfaces on. A row whose client_scopes excludes the rendering surface MUST NOT render as available there.

service_contract_state.description: Required when surface_class = service_health. Null otherwise.

degraded_state_cause.description: Required when freshness_class is below authoritative_live, version_match_state is below exact_build_match, or service_contract_state is below ready. Null otherwise.

repair_hook_ref.description: Required (non-null) when degraded_state_cause is non-null. Null otherwise.

browser_handoff_packet_ref.description: Required (non-null) when the badge exposes an out-of-product action. Null otherwise. Surfaces MUST NOT call the system browser directly; raw URL launches from docs / help / service-health surfaces are forbidden.

browser_handoff_reason.description: Inline copy of browser_handoff_packet_ref.reason_code, exposed on the badge so a parity audit can read the reason without joining packets. Required when browser_handoff_packet_ref is non-null. Null otherwise.

external_status_feed.description: True when source_class = external_status_feed. Lets parity audits distinguish a docs deep-link from a status-feed deep-link without re-parsing the source class.

vendor_overrides_project.description: True when this row is vendor docs rendered in place of in-scope project docs. The typed disclosure renders on the primary surface alongside the chip; tooltip-only disclosure is forbidden.

citation_anchor_refs.description: Anchor ids the row backs itself with. MUST be non-empty when source_class = derived_explanation. Optional otherwise. Each id resolves to a citation_anchor_record with the same anchor_id.

lifecycle_label.description: Optional renderer hint when the row also carries an ADR-0011 lifecycle posture. Re-exported from schemas/governance/capability_lifecycle.schema.json. Surfaces treat it as a separate chip from the freshness / version-match chips.

last_refreshed_at.description: Monotonic timestamp of the last refresh against the canonical owner. Null when the row has not yet been refreshed.

allOf.description: service_contract_state MUST be non-null when surface_class = service_health.
browser_handoff_reason MUST be non-null when browser_handoff_packet_ref is non-null.
repair_hook_ref MUST be non-null when degraded_state_cause is non-null.

help_status_badge_record.description: Parity-audit contract emitted by every docs / Help / About / service-health / support-summary / onboarding / AI-explanation surface. Required parity fields (surface_class, source_class, version_match_state, running_build_identity_ref, freshness_class, client_scopes, degraded_state_cause, browser_handoff_reason, external_status_feed, vendor_overrides_project, policy_context, redaction_class) MUST be addressable on every emitted record so a later parity audit can compare surfaces field-for-field without inventing badge semantics.

source_revision_ref.description: Opaque pin to the docs-pack / generated-reference / runbook revision the anchor was minted against. Required for reconstructing the exact view a user saw.

target_path_or_symbol_ref.description: The relative path inside the pack, the symbol id inside the graph, the runbook step id, or the service-health event id.

target_build_identity_ref.description: Running-build id the anchor was minted under (D-0011). Lets a parity audit recompute the version_match_state if the running build changed.

citation_anchor_record.description: Typed citation anchor reserved for the citation / symbol-reference packet lane. Anchors hold ids only; raw page bodies, raw symbol definitions, and raw runbook bodies are fetched from the canonical owner on demand.

browser_handoff_packet_id.description: Packet id when the event is browser_handoff_from_docs_help_service_health_issued. Null otherwise.

denial_reason.description: Required (non-null) for help_status_badge_refused, derived_explanation_uncited_refused, about_packet_publisher_unresolved, and parity_audit_field_missing events.

docs_help_service_health_audit_event_rec.description: Audit event emitted on the docs_help_service_health audit stream. Events MUST NOT carry raw docs bytes, raw runbook bodies, raw symbol definitions, or raw URLs.
